title: Jani Strömberg will defend his PhD thesis
content:
Jani Strömberg will defend his PhD thesis

mkulmala@helsinki.fi Mon, 27/04/2026 - 10:23

Jani Strömberg will defend his PhD thesis titled "Turbulent Transport Processes in Urban Boundary Layers Across Scales". The public examination will be held on Thursday, 28.5.2026, at 13 o'clock in the Exactum building, room CK112 (Pietari Kalmin Katu 5, 00560, Helsinki).

The defence will also be streamed on Unitube:

title: Leading Pedagogy Through Dialogue: Lessons from the March HEP-TED Pedagogical Leadership Workshops in Rwanda
content:
Leading Pedagogy Through Dialogue: Lessons from the March HEP-TED Pedagogical Leadership Workshops in Rwanda

aisalmi@helsinki.fi Mon, 27/04/2026 - 09:58
Between 8 and 12 March 2026, the HEP-TED quality assurance (QA) team and high-level representatives of Tampere Universities gathered in Rwanda for an intensive series of workshops, held in the Rwandan Polytechnic (RP) campus in Kigali and University of Rwanda-College of Education (UR-CE) campus in Rukara.

title: Helsingin yliopistossa opiskeleva Max Ahonen kehitti koirille terveyskaulapannan: jonossa jo yli 10 000 ihmistä
content:
University of Helsinki student Max Ahonen’s dog health collar attracts waiting list of over 10,000

ellamati@helsinki.fi Fri, 24/04/2026 - 09:45
What if you could keep track of your dog’s health just as people do with smartwatches? University of Helsinki chemistry student Max Ahonen has developed a smart collar that monitors dog health, tracking their activity, body temperature, sleep and heart rate.

title: Research group contributes to the territorial future of the EU
content:
Research group contributes to the territorial future of the EU

samoisio@helsinki.fi Thu, 23/04/2026 - 12:20
The TFF is a high-level policy platform that brings together Member States' Directors-General for Territorial Cohesion and Urban Matters, the European Commission, European institutions, umbrella organisations and independent experts to enable dialogue on the territorial future of the EU.

title: Arkadiankadun siltaremontti aiheuttaa muutoksia liikennejärjestelyihin Luonnontieteellisen museon lähistöllä
content:
Renewal of Arkadiankatu Bridge will cause changes to traffic arrangements near the Natural History Museum

johanemi@helsinki.fi Wed, 07/01/2026 - 08:40
The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

The renovation will start with the construction of temporary traffic arrangements from Wednesday 7 January onwards. The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.
